# ceph_user (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Ceph user name (e.g. client.rgw).

### Read-Only

- `caps` (Map of String) Ceph user capabilities.
- `key` (String, Sensitive) Ceph user key.
